meaning: 9R:tEJ`tetrE9pRId/n.同源四倍体lRIdI/n.[生]同源(由二倍体生物的姿谋缎
examples: The critical problem encountered in the breeding work of autotetraploid rice is the low and unstable fertility.
This paper studied the fertilization of the hybrid between autotetraploid sorghum and Johnson grass and the genetic characters of the hybrid generation.
The seed setting rate has no obvious difference between autotriploid and autotetraploid, but it will rise with the increase of the self-bred generations.
